value.value: Cannot send invoices with zero balance
Invoice must be sent to be viewed
Cannot apply payment to invoice in current status
Payment amount cannot exceed amount due
Refund amount cannot exceed amount paid
Invoice must be sent to be marked overdue
Invoice must be past due date
Cannot send reminder for invoice in current status
Cannot send reminder for paid invoices
Cannot void invoices that are paid or partially paid
Can only write off overdue or partially paid invoices
Write off amount must not exceed amount due
Can only modify line items in draft invoices
